title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.070 - Challenge for other causes not allowed
text:
540.070.  Challenge for other causes not allowed. — No challenge to the array of grand jurors, or to any person summoned as a grand juror, shall be allowed except as provided in section 540.045 and in section 540.050.
(RSMo 1939 § 3904, A.L. 1989 S.B. 127, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3515; 1919 § 3860; 1909 § 5068
